value.found_quote: Continue a local Claude Code session from your phone, tablet, or any browser using Remote Control. Works with claude.ai/code and the Claude mobile app.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Remote Control as a feature that lets users continue a local Claude Code session running on their machine from a phone, tablet, or browser — exactly matching the claim. The page also states "Remote Control is in research preview and available on all plans," indicating it is in an early/preview stage rather than fully generally available.
